MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Mary Gillespie.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Timothy Doyle is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-26-2012 is vacated.
